parameters.name: texasGrantFundCodes
parameters.description: Comma-separated Texas grant fund code(s) - RPRAWRD_FUND_CODE, e.g. TXEG,TPEG

parameters.name: attestationTreqCode
parameters.description: Tracking requirement code for the felony/controlled-substance attestation - RRRAREQ_TREQ_CODE

parameters.name: trstCodeYes
parameters.description: Status code recorded when the student attests YES - RRRAREQ_TRST_CODE

parameters.name: trstCodeNo
parameters.description: Status code recorded when the student attests NO - RRRAREQ_TRST_CODE
